entities.name: ARENAVIRIDAE
entities.description: A family of viruses that was expanded in 2018 by the inclusion of one new genus and five novel species

entities.name: BUNYAVIRALES
entities.description: An order of viruses that was expanded by three species and includes the family Arenaviridae

entities.name: TAXONOMY
entities.description: The scientific classification system used to organize the family Arenaviridae and the order Bunyavirales

entities.name: INTERNATIONAL COMMITTEE ON TAXONOMY OF VIRUSES
entities.description: The governing body that accepts the updated taxonomic classifications of Arenaviridae and Bunyavirales

relationships.description: is a family within the order

relationships.source: INTERNATIONAL COMMITTEE ON TAXONOMY OF VIRUSES
INTERNATIONAL COMMITTEE ON TAXONOMY OF VIRUSES
